entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The main agricultural crop discussed in the registration.

entities.name: VENUS
entities.description: A new virginia bunch groundnut cultivar developed by bulk selection.

entities.name: KADIRI 3
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used as a parent in the cross to develop Venus.

entities.name: CS-9
entities.description: A stable interspecific derivative groundnut used as a parent in the cross to develop Venus.

entities.name: ICGS 76
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used for yield comparison with Venus.

entities.name: DECUMBENT HABIT
entities.description: The growth habit of the Venus cultivar.

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the cultivar to reach maturity, varying by season.

entities.name: POD SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the groundnut pods.

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The ratio of seed weight to total pod weight.

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, which varies by season and location.

entities.name: SEED COLOUR
entities.description: The color of the seeds of the Venus cultivar.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pod produced per unit area.

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the cultivar to resist infection by Puccinia arachidis.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the cultivar to tolerate infection by Mycosphaerella berkeleyi.

entities.name: BULK SELECTION
entities.description: The breeding method used to develop the Venus cultivar.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of breeding two different cultivars to create a new variety.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which maturity is 120-125 days.

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which maturity is 135-140 days.

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The agricultural season during which pod yield trials were conducted.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location where pod yield trials were conducted.

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in groundnuts.

entities.name: MYCOSPHAERELLA BERKELEYI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot in groundnuts.

entities.name: VIRGINIA BUNCH
entities.description: The specific type or group of groundnut to which Venus belongs.
